Meet the team
👋 Hi there, I'm

CHITATSI — the little robot that follows you and carries the load.

Just load me up and walk — I'll trot along behind you, dodge anything in the way, and hand over your stuff when we arrive. No driving, no remote, no fuss.

See what I can do → Meet my makers

The big idea

A helping hand on wheels

In big warehouses, people walk 8 to 15 kilometres a day hauling boxes around by hand. It's exhausting — and it slows everyone down.

CHITATSI is here to help. Think of it as a friendly cart that drives itself: it knows who to follow, carries the heavy things, and gently weaves around people and shelves all on its own.

When you reach the drop-off spot, it opens its little gate and lets the load out. Then it's ready to go again. Simple as that. 🙂

How it works

A clever head and quick feet

Just like us, CHITATSI has one part that thinks and one part that reacts — working together so it's both smart and steady.

🧠

The clever head

It sees and decides

This is the part that looks through the camera and figures out what to do next.

  • Spots you and the things around it
  • Decides where to go and how to follow
  • Sends updates to a control screen
🦿

The quick feet

It moves right away

This part handles all the split-second movements that keep it smooth and balanced.

  • Spins the wheels hundreds of times a second
  • Keeps it going straight and turning neatly
  • Opens and closes the cargo gate
The fun part

Here's everything it can do

It can see

A camera and a bit of smart AI let CHITATSI recognise people and objects in real time. Those are its eyes!

It follows only you

It looks for you and a special tag together — so it always sticks with the right person and never chases a stranger.

It dodges things

It watches the path ahead and slows, stops, or steers around shelves, boxes, and people — quick as a blink.

It carries & delivers

Your load rides safely in its cargo bed, and a little gate pops open to drop everything off right where you need it.

You stay in charge

A friendly screen shows its speed, how much it's carrying, and what it's up to — plus a button to drive it yourself.

It stops in a snap

One press of the big red button cuts the power right away. Safety first, always — so it's lovely to work alongside.

Made by hand

A real robot, really built

Every piece was designed, cut, wired, and tested by the team. This little helper truly works!

All finished & readyCamera, sensors, lights and a big red stop button
Inside the robotWhere all the wiring & brains live
Under the hood

Lots of parts, one happy team

A camera and sensors to look around, two little computers for brains and reflexes, motors to move smoothly, a gate to deliver, and a safety system that keeps it all in check.

Everything chats together and reports back to a control screen — so a person always knows exactly what's going on.

Smart camera vision Precise to under 1 cm Steady balance Hardware safety
The humans behind it

Say hello to Team 4

Five mechatronics engineering students who dreamed up CHITATSI and built it from scratch at Ain Shams University.

Friendly help, built for real warehouses

CHITATSI is a cheerful, affordable little helper made for the busy fulfilment centres growing across Egypt and the region.
